highlights.text: I wrote at the close Wednesday (when we were at 6770): “My general lean is we correct/consolidate.
We saw this on Tuesday where ES back-tested the 6745 shelf we broke down last week that caused the late September collapse, and we went “elevator down” into Wednesday morning to 6680.
Short squeezes are all caused by the same thing: A Failed Breakdown.

I wrote Tuesday at 4pm: “Another option to long is the Failed Breakdown of today’s daily low at 6693.” Early Wednesday morning we flushed 6693 down to 6680, recovered 6693, then went parabolic to 6782 by yesterday morning.

post_title: October Begins With A Bang. Can The Parabola Continue Next Week In SPX, Or Cool-Off Needed? Oct 6 Plan
